---
title: "Experiments"
listing:
  contents:
    - "*.qmd"
  exclude:
    filename: "index.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: table
  fields: [date, title, categories, description]
  field-display-names:
    date: "Date"
    title: "Experiment"
    categories: "Tags"
    description: "Result summary"
  date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
---

One entry per experiment run. Filed by date. Committed to git when complete.

Templates live in `experiments/_templates/` — copy the relevant one to start a new entry.
